---
title: "01a_redownload_missing_files"
author: "Vinci Chan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc_expand: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# 1. Setup

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyverse)
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)

source("R/config.R")
source("R/utils_dates.R")
source("R/utils_db.R")

dates <- make_quarter_tbl(
  start_year = cfg$start_year,
  end_year   = cfg$end_year,
)
```

# 2. Functions

## 2.1. Identify missing files

```{r}
find.missing.file <- function(year_qtr) {
  master_file_path <- file.path(cfg$master_index_dir, paste0("master_", year_qtr, ".csv"))
  sqlite_file_path <- sqlite_path(year_qtr)

  # Load master
  master <- read_csv(master_file_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

  # Load filenames from SQLite
  con <- dbConnect(SQLite(), sqlite_file_path)
  on.exit(dbDisconnect(con), add = TRUE)

  db_files <- tbl(con, "compsubm") %>%
    select(FILENAME) %>%
    distinct() %>% 
    as_tibble()

  # Find rows that do not match
  missing <- master %>%
    anti_join(db_files, by = c("file" = "FILENAME"))

  missing
}
```

# 2.2. Redownload missing files

```{r}
dwnld.files <- function(missing) {
  dir.create(cfg$staging_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  missing <- missing %>% distinct(file, .keep_all = TRUE)

  pb <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, max = nrow(missing), style = 3)

  for (j in seq_len(nrow(missing))) {
    file_path <- file.path(cfg$staging_dir, missing$file[j])

    success <- FALSE
    for (attempt in 1:3) {
      tryCatch(
        {
          download.file(
            missing$link[j],
            file_path,
            quiet   = TRUE,
            headers = c("User-Agent" = cfg$sec_user_agent),
            mode    = "wb"
          )
          success <- TRUE
          break
        },
        error = function(e) {
          wait <- 5 * attempt        # 5s, 10s, 15s
          cat(sprintf(
            "\nFile %d/%d attempt %d failed, waiting %ds\n",
            j, nrow(missing), attempt, wait
          ))
          Sys.sleep(wait)
        }
      )
    }

    if (!success) {
      cat(sprintf(
        "\n*** Gave up on filing %d/%d: %s ***\n",
        j, nrow(missing), missing$file[j]
      ))
    }

    setTxtProgressBar(pb, j)
    Sys.sleep(0.13)   # ~7 requests/sec, conservative
  }

  close(pb)
  cat("\nQuarter missing filings downloaded (a few may still be skipped)\n")
}
```

# 2.3. Add missing files to SQLite

```{r}
put.files.in.sql <- function(dbname) {
  together <- function(x) paste(x, collapse = "\n")

  con <- dbConnect(SQLite(), dbname = dbname)

  path <- cfg$staging_dir
  files <- list.files(path)
  n <- length(files)

  if (n == 0) {
    message("No files in staging_dir; nothing to add to SQLite")
    dbDisconnect(con)
    unlink(cfg$staging_dir, recursive = TRUE)
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  step <- 500
  for (i in 1:(n %/% step + 1)) {
    start <- 1 + (i - 1) * step
    end   <- i * step
    ind   <- start:min(end, n)

    objects <- lapply(file.path(path, files[ind]), readLines)
    clean   <- lapply(objects, together)

    data <- data.frame(
      FILENAME   = files[ind],
      COMLSUBFILE = unlist(clean),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    dbWriteTable(con, "compsubm", data, append = TRUE)
  }

  dbDisconnect(con)
  unlink(cfg$staging_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}
```

# 3. Loop over all quarters

```{r}
for (i in seq_len(nrow(dates))) {
  cat(sprintf(
    "\n=== Quarter %d/%d: %s ===\n",
    i, nrow(dates), dates$year_qtr[i]
  ))
  print(Sys.time())

  missing <- find.missing.file(dates$year_qtr[i])

  if (nrow(missing) > 0) {
    cat("Redownloading", nrow(missing),
        "missing filings for", dates$year_qtr[i], "\n")
    dwnld.files(missing)
  } else {
    cat("No missing filings for", dates$year_qtr[i], "\n")
  }

  cat("Loading to SQL...\n")
  put.files.in.sql(sqlite_path(dates$year_qtr[i]))
  cat("Missing filings loaded to SQL\n")
}
```
